text_fields.name: Cyrus Shekari
text_fields.cards[07fdf1f1-9952-493d-a9b7-320969a56f: Not applicable - I am applying for a full-time role, not a fellowship.
I can start within two weeks of receiving an offer.

options.label: A lawful permanent resident of the United States (i.e. Greencard holder)

radios.name: cards[5f2a739c-bb0e-4283-92c6-1dc8c09b459c][field0]
radios.value:
I'm excited about the opportunity to work at Shield AI because I'm drawn to organizations that operate at scale, solve complex technical challenges, and prioritize innovation and long-term impact. Throughout my experience at Microsoft and Amazon Robotics, I've enjoyed working at the intersection of technology, operations, and strategy — leading cross-functional initiatives, building scalable systems, and driving measurable business outcomes.

What particularly interests me about Shield AI is the opportunity to contribute to high-impact products and programs while collaborating with talented teams across engineering, product, and business functions. I'm especially motivated by environments where I can combine technical depth with program leadership to improve reliability, automation, and operational efficiency.

In my current role, I've led large-scale resilience and automation initiatives, developed AI-driven workflow solutions, and managed complex cross-organizational programs under executive visibility. I enjoy taking ambiguous problems, creating structure, and driving execution from concept through delivery. I'd be excited to bring that same mindset to Shield AI while continuing to grow in a fast-paced and innovative environment.

Beyond the technical challenges, I'm also looking for a company whose culture emphasizes ownership, collaboration, and continuous improvement. From what I've seen, Shield AI aligns strongly with those values, which makes the opportunity especially compelling to me.

args.comment: If a visible hCaptcha enclave is present, run CaptchaSolver().solve_hcaptcha(...) with the detected sitekey, inject the token, then re-click Submit. If no key is configured, fail this role only and continue the batch.
